creator: elbarto@arcadebsd.org
text:
Hello Alejandro,

  Here is the diff between sdlmame and the new port sdlmame-devel.

  - Port use ~/.mame-devel
  - MAKE_JOBS_SAFE is set to yes
  - As sdlmame/sdlmess port as an option to build the inside debugger.

  Cheers.
-- 
Emmanuel Vadot
elbarto@arcadebsd.org
